name: Feature request
description: Propose a focused HookBridge enhancement
title: "feat: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What workflow, limitation, or operational concern should this feature address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior, API, configuration, documentation, or user interface change you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

List alternatives, workarounds, or existing patterns you considered.

## Impact and Compatibility

Describe expected impact on deployments, APIs, security, observability, backwards compatibility, or documentation.

## Contribution Interest

Are you interested in contributing an implementation or helping test the change?
